# scenarios.txt
# One topic per line. Append | open for free discussion (no options).
# Lines starting with # are ignored.
# Run with: python main.py scenarios.txt

# Decision topics (options generated by LLM)
Plan a birthday party for a colleague
Book a flight to Stockholm, Sweden
Decide on a team-building activity
Choose a restaurant for a farewell dinner

# Open-ended topics (free exchange, no voting)
Is God real? | open
Should we go out tonight? | open
Is remote work better than office work? | open
What programming language should we learn next? | open
